title: galium heldreichii subsp. protopycnotrichum
intro: Galium heldreichii subsp. protopycnotrichum, also known as the Balkan bedstraw or Galium heldreichii subsp. protopycnotrichum, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Galium heldreichii subsp. protopycnotrichum include its potential to help with digestive issues, relieve anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system, all of which contribute to its traditional use in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Galium heldreichii subsp. protopycnotrichum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
